TEXT.source: Atayal Wikipedia, article: kayal(天空;天氣)
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: kayal qani hya' ga, pzyux qu kkyalan niya' ini' ptnaq, maki' qu blaq kayal , ri yaqih kayal . blaq kayal hya ga, nanu' yaqu smbu' wagi' , ru mswat , nanak qani qu sawn 'tayal maha blaq kayal hya'. yaqih kayal hya' lga, yaqu psbayhuy , ru mqwalax , ru mczngsuy ,qani qu sawn 'tayal naha yaqih kayal. nanu' qu kkayal na maha yaqih kayal qani hya' ga, mzyay' su' maha, tmrang musa' sami rgyax sa kawas wayal ga, minlu' shngan sami na mhlaqiy , ru shtuy sami niya' kya rgyax, ungat qbaqan myan lru si myan niqiy kya qu tniriq myan qsinuw la, kmzima' balay lga, msqsya' qu hlaqiy niya' lru mwah sami la. ulung kya cikay na' qu ini' myan thkiy na qsinuw, mwah sami ru tayhuk sami b'bu' rgyax ttnga' ngasal lga, mqwalax la, maymaw maras qayrang qwalax nya' qasa, ana yan nasa ga, si sami qhqihul mwah, nanu' mawzyay sami balay qhzyaqan balay la. tayhuk sami ngasal lga mswat la. ana si kswat lga rima' mlhngan lkiy.
S.PHON: kajal qani ħjaʔ ɣa, pzjux qu kkjalan nijaʔ iniʔ ptnaq, makiʔ qu βlaq kajal , ri jaqiħ kajal . βlaq kajal ħja ɣa, nanuʔ jaqu s~ɕmβuʔ waɣiʔ , ru ms~ɕwat , nanak qani qu s~ɕawn ʔtajal maħa βlaq kajal ħjaʔ. jaqiħ kajal ħjaʔ lɣa, jaqu ps~ɕβajħuj , ru mqwalax , ru mʦ~ʨzŋs~ɕuj ,qani qu s~ɕawn ʔtajal naħa jaqiħ kajal. nanuʔ qu kkajal na maħa jaqiħ kajal qani ħjaʔ ɣa, mzjajʔ s~ɕuʔ maħa, tmraŋ mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕami rɣjax s~ɕa kawas~ɕ wajal ɣa, minluʔ s~ɕħŋan s~ɕami na mħlaqij , ru s~ɕħtuj s~ɕami nijaʔ kja rɣjax, uŋat qβaqan mjan lru s~ɕi mjan niqij kja qu tniriq mjan qs~ɕinuw la, kmzimaʔ βalaj lɣa, ms~ɕqs~ɕjaʔ qu ħlaqij nijaʔ lru mwaħ s~ɕami la. uluŋ kja ʦ~ʨikaj naʔ qu iniʔ mjan tħkij na qs~ɕinuw, mwaħ s~ɕami ru tajħuk s~ɕami βʔβuʔ rɣjax ttŋaʔ ŋas~ɕal lɣa, mqwalax la, majmaw maras~ɕ qajraŋ qwalax njaʔ qas~ɕa, ana jan nas~ɕa ɣa, s~ɕi s~ɕami qħqiħul mwaħ, nanuʔ mawzjaj s~ɕami βalaj qħzjaqan βalaj la. tajħuk s~ɕami ŋas~ɕal lɣa ms~ɕwat la. ana s~ɕi ks~ɕwat lɣa rimaʔ mlħŋan lkij.
S.FORM: kayal qani hya' ga, pzyux qu kkyalan niya' ini' ptnaq, maki' qu blaq kayal , ri yaqih kayal . blaq kayal hya ga, nanu' yaqu smbu' wagi' , ru mswat , nanak qani qu sawn 'tayal maha blaq kayal hya'. yaqih kayal hya' lga, yaqu psbayhuy , ru mqwalax , ru mczngsuy ,qani qu sawn 'tayal naha yaqih kayal. nanu' qu kkayal na maha yaqih kayal qani hya' ga, mzyay' su' maha, tmrang musa' sami rgyax sa kawas wayal ga, minlu' shngan sami na mhlaqiy , ru shtuy sami niya' kya rgyax, ungat qbaqan myan lru si myan niqiy kya qu tniriq myan qsinuw la, kmzima' balay lga, msqsya' qu hlaqiy niya' lru mwah sami la. ulung kya cikay na' qu ini' myan thkiy na qsinuw, mwah sami ru tayhuk sami b'bu' rgyax ttnga' ngasal lga, mqwalax la, maymaw maras qayrang qwalax nya' qasa, ana yan nasa ga, si sami qhqihul mwah, nanu' mawzyay sami balay qhzyaqan balay la. tayhuk sami ngasal lga mswat la. ana si kswat lga rima' mlhngan lkiy.
S.PHON: kajal qani ħjaʔ ɣa, pzjux qu kkjalan nijaʔ iniʔ ptnaq, makiʔ qu βlaq kajal , ri jaqiħ kajal . βlaq kajal ħja ɣa, nanuʔ jaqu s~ɕmβuʔ waɣiʔ , ru ms~ɕwat , nanak qani qu s~ɕawn ʔtajal maħa βlaq kajal ħjaʔ. jaqiħ kajal ħjaʔ lɣa, jaqu ps~ɕβajħuj , ru mqwalax , ru mʦ~ʨzŋs~ɕuj ,qani qu s~ɕawn ʔtajal naħa jaqiħ kajal. nanuʔ qu kkajal na maħa jaqiħ kajal qani ħjaʔ ɣa, mzjajʔ s~ɕuʔ maħa, tmraŋ mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕami rɣjax s~ɕa kawas~ɕ wajal ɣa, minluʔ s~ɕħŋan s~ɕami na mħlaqij , ru s~ɕħtuj s~ɕami nijaʔ kja rɣjax, uŋat qβaqan mjan lru s~ɕi mjan niqij kja qu tniriq mjan qs~ɕinuw la, kmzimaʔ βalaj lɣa, ms~ɕqs~ɕjaʔ qu ħlaqij nijaʔ lru mwaħ s~ɕami la. uluŋ kja ʦ~ʨikaj naʔ qu iniʔ mjan tħkij na qs~ɕinuw, mwaħ s~ɕami ru tajħuk s~ɕami βʔβuʔ rɣjax ttŋaʔ ŋas~ɕal lɣa, mqwalax la, majmaw maras~ɕ qajraŋ qwalax njaʔ qas~ɕa, ana jan nas~ɕa ɣa, s~ɕi s~ɕami qħqiħul mwaħ, nanuʔ mawzjaj s~ɕami βalaj qħzjaqan βalaj la. tajħuk s~ɕami ŋas~ɕal lɣa ms~ɕwat la. ana s~ɕi ks~ɕwat lɣa rimaʔ mlħŋan lkij.
